checks.message: Skill Challenge effects metadata file exists.
Effects metadata is marked for Phase 3.5D schema version 2.
catastrophicFailure is represented in effect metadata.
catastrophicFailure has a stable effect identifier.
restrictedSkills is represented in effect metadata.
restrictedSkills has a stable effect identifier.
recovery is represented in effect metadata.
recovery has a stable effect identifier.
secondEffort is represented in effect metadata.
secondEffort has a stable effect identifier.
timedChallenge is represented in effect metadata.
timedChallenge has a stable effect identifier.
State normalization applies safe default parameters for implemented effects.
Catastrophic Failure adjusts failed roll outcomes before GM accepts suggested results.
Restricted Skills downgrades unlisted skills to GM review.
Recovery can remove one accumulated failure through a GM action.
Second Effort records a GM-approved retry/additional attempt without mutating roll math.
Timed Challenge supports a GM-adjusted countdown.
Engine exposes effect actions for the GM tracker.
GM surface controller handles effect action buttons.
GM form parser accepts optional JSON effect parameters.
GM surface service decorates effects for display and controls.
GM template exposes manual effect controls.
GM datapad CSS includes basic effect control styling.
Phase 3.5D still does not implement Skill Challenge feat hooks.
Challenge effects do not roll dice or duplicate the skill roller.
